_comment: clair hook wiring — a --settings MERGE file (Claude Code merges this with the user's settings). `clair with` generates the canonical version under <GIT_DIR>/clair/session-settings.json with absolute, forward-slashed, POSIX-quoted shim paths baked in. This template documents the shape; replace <ABS> with the absolute path to each shim (e.g. the ones in skills/clair/hooks/). On Windows, hooks invoke shell scripts via `bash "<abs>"`.
